content: YoRHa 2B: Fucking draugr ruins again... Smells like mold and old cum in here. At least the damp air makes my skin glisten. You ever think Dibella’s just laughin’ at us, crawlin’ through tombs slick with sweat while bandits and corpses wait to bend us over? Enyala: Hah! If Dibella ain’t laughin’, she’s got a piss-poor sense of humor. Those draugr might be dust and bones, but their fingers still grip tighter than a horny bandit’s cock. Last one I gutted tried to finger me mid-swing. Had to fuck his skull open with my axe after. YoRHa 2B: Sounds like foreplay to you, Enyala.
